name: White Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix white chocolate and melted butter together.
2. Add to softened cream cheese.
3. Stir in vanilla and almond extracts.
4. Stir in powdered sugar.
5. Spread on cake.
6. Makes enough for 4 9-inch layers or 2 layer sheet cakes.
7. Excellent with carrot cake.
